name: routecodex
description: Multi-provider OpenAI proxy server with anthropic/responses/chat support (dev)

scripts.build: npm run verify:architecture-review-surface-light && npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate && npm run build:base && npm run verify:servertool-rust-only && npm run verify:architecture-ci
scripts.build:min: npm run verify:architecture-review-surface-light && npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate && npm run build:base && npm run verify:servertool-rust-only
scripts.build:dev: bash -lc 'export BUILD_MODE=dev ROUTECODEX_BUILD_RESTART_ONLY=1 ROUTECODEX_INSTALL_VERIFY_PORT=5555; npm run build:base && npm run fix:cli-permission'
scripts.build:dev:full: bash -lc 'export BUILD_MODE=dev ROUTECODEX_BUILD_RESTART_ONLY=1; npm run cleanup:stale-server-pids || true; trap "npm run cleanup:stale-server-pids >/dev/null 2>&1 || true" EXIT; npm run build:base && npm run fix:cli-permission && npm run test:unified-hub-shadow && npm run verify:e2e-toolcall && npm run verify:apply-patch && npm run verify:apply-patch-regressions && npm run verify:exec-command && npm run test:routing-instructions && npm run test:cli && npm run mock:regressions && npm run verify:errorsamples'
scripts.test: npm run test:routing-instructions && npm run mock:regressions
scripts.test:regressions: npm run test:unified-hub-shadow && npm run verify:provider-failure-ban-blackbox && npm run mock:regressions && npm run verify:errorsamples
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:ci:jest && npm run mock:regressions
scripts.test:request-payload-copy-budget-executo: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.spec.ts --runInBand -t "retry seeds without eager duplicate snapshots"
scripts.test:request-payload-copy-budget-cargo: cargo test --manifest-path sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/Cargo.toml -p router-hotpath-napi normalize_responses_input_items --lib -- --nocapture && cargo test --manifest-path sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/Cargo.toml -p router-hotpath-napi request_payload_copy_budget --lib -- --nocapture
scripts.verify:request-payload-copy-budget: npm run test:request-payload-copy-budget-retry && npm run test:request-payload-copy-budget-executor && npm run test:request-payload-copy-budget-cargo
scripts.verify:snapshot-payload-copy-budget: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/snapshot-payload-copy-budget.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/snapshot-recorder-native-plan.spec.ts --runInBand && npm run test:snapshot-payload-copy-budget-cargo
scripts.test:servertool-core-shared-helpers-carg: cargo test --manifest-path sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/Cargo.toml -p router-hotpath-napi contextual_json_helpers_preserve_error_context --lib -- --nocapture && cargo test --manifest-path sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/Cargo.toml -p router-hotpath-napi servertool_core_blocks --lib -- --nocapture
scripts.test:vr-shared-function-library-helpers-: cargo test --manifest-path sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/Cargo.toml -p router-hotpath-napi vr_shared_function_library_helpers --lib -- --nocapture && cargo test --manifest-path sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/Cargo.toml -p router-hotpath-napi error_err05_availability --lib -- --nocapture && cargo test --manifest-path sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/Cargo.toml -p router-hotpath-napi detect_coding_tool --lib -- --nocapture && cargo test --manifest-path sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/Cargo.toml -p router-hotpath-napi detect_web_tool --lib -- --nocapture
scripts.test:routing-instructions: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/runtime/request-executor.single-attempt.spec.ts tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/usage-aggregator.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/daemon-admin.e2e.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/hub-policy-injection.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/session-dir.spec.ts tests/server/handlers/sse-timeout.spec.ts tests/utils/is-direct-execution.test.ts tests/utils/windows-netstat.test.ts tests/servertool/virtual-router-context-fallback.spec.ts tests/servertool/virtual-router-longcontext-fallback.spec.ts tests/servertool/routing-instructions.spec.ts tests/servertool/stop-message-sample-replay.spec.ts tests/servertool/stop-message-auto.config-precedence.spec.ts tests/servertool/stop-schema-lifecycle-contract.spec.ts tests/servertool/stopless-direct-mode-guard.spec.ts tests/servertool/servertool-active-orchestration-audit.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/virtual-router-hit-log.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/virtual-router-routing-model-validation.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/anthropic-tool-schema-stability.spec.ts tests/unified-hub/hub-v1-single-path-imports.spec.ts
scripts.test:cli: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/cli/clean-command.spec.ts tests/cli/code-command.spec.ts tests/cli/config-command.spec.ts tests/cli/env-command.spec.ts tests/cli/env-output.spec.ts tests/cli/examples-command.spec.ts tests/cli/launcher-utils.spec.ts tests/cli/port-command.spec.ts tests/cli/port-utils.spec.ts tests/cli/restart-command.spec.ts tests/cli/smoke.spec.ts tests/cli/start-command.spec.ts tests/cli/status-command.spec.ts tests/cli/stop-command.spec.ts
scripts.test:webui: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/frontend/webui-app.utils.spec.ts tests/frontend/webui-app.render.spec.tsx tests/frontend/webui-app.integration.spec.tsx tests/frontend/webui-app.pages.spec.tsx tests/frontend/webui-app.edge.spec.tsx
scripts.test:webui:coverage: npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/frontend/webui-app.utils.spec.ts tests/frontend/webui-app.render.spec.tsx tests/frontend/webui-app.integration.spec.tsx tests/frontend/webui-app.pages.spec.tsx tests/frontend/webui-app.edge.spec.tsx --coverage --collectCoverageFrom=webui/src/App.tsx
scripts.verify:architecture-review-surface-light: npm run verify:architecture-no-custom-payload-carriers && npm run verify:architecture-mainline-call-map && npm run verify:architecture-mainline-node-id-consistency && npm run verify:architecture-mainline-binding-pending-gate && npm run verify:resource-source-bindings && npm run verify:agent-collab-protocol && npm run verify:architecture-wiki-sync && npm run verify:architecture-wiki-html-sync && npm run verify:architecture-manifest-sync && npm run verify:architecture-metadata-center-manifest-code-sync && npm run verify:architecture-metadata-center-write-boundaries && npm run verify:architecture-mainline-manifest-sync && npm run verify:architecture-topology-doc-sync && npm run verify:servertool-mount-boundary
scripts.test:v3-managed-server-lifecycle: CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-config config_source_identity_is_stable_sensitive_and_secret_free -- --exact && CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-lifecycle -- --test-threads=1 && CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-cli --test managed_lifecycle -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture
scripts.test:v3-openai-chat-relay-runtime-integr: CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-runtime --test openai_chat_relay_runtime_integration -- --nocapture && CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-server --test openai_chat_relay_controlled -- --nocapture
scripts.test:v3-gemini-relay-runtime-integration: CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-runtime --test gemini_relay_runtime_integration -- --nocapture && CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-server --test gemini_relay_controlled -- --nocapture
scripts.test:v3-hub-relay-runtime-closeout: CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-runtime --test hub_relay_runtime_closeout -- --nocapture
scripts.test:v3-relay-hook-resources: cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-config --test config_v3_contract -- --test-threads=1 && cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-runtime --test hub_v1_h1_contract -- --test-threads=1
scripts.test:v3-responses-direct-remote-continua: cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-config remote_continuation_is_bound_to_responses_websocket_v2_transport -- --nocapture && cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-provider-responses --test responses_websocket_v2 -- --nocapture && cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-runtime --test responses_direct_remote_continuation_integration -- --nocapture && cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-server --test multi_listener_server responses_direct_server_replays_two_turn -- --nocapture
scripts.test:v3-responses-inbound-websocket-prox: CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true cargo test --manifest-path v3/Cargo.toml -p routecodex-v3-server --test multi_listener_server responses_inbound_websocket -- --nocapture
scripts.verify:architecture-review-surface: npm run verify:architecture-review-surface-light && npm run verify:architecture-wiki-browser-smoke
scripts.verify:function-map-compile-gate: npm run verify:architecture-function-map-parseable && npm run verify:architecture-feature-id-anchors && npm run verify:architecture-feature-anchor-coverage && npm run verify:architecture-feature-map-growth-discipline && npm run verify:architecture-owner-queryability && npm run verify:function-map-coverage && npm run verify:function-map-paths && npm run verify:function-map-boundary-mentions && npm run verify:function-map-owner-uniqueness && npm run verify:function-map-canonical-builder-definitions && npm run verify:function-map-forbidden-mentions && npm run verify:function-map-required-tests && npm run verify:function-map-build-wiring
scripts.verify:config-ssot: npm run jest:run -- --runInBand --runTestsByPath tests/config/unified-config-paths.spec.ts tests/config/config-writer.spec.ts tests/config/routecodex-config-loader.v2-single-source.spec.ts tests/config/provider-v2-loader.spec.ts tests/config/toml-codec.spec.ts tests/grep/config-codec-gate.spec.ts
scripts.verify:config-path-resolution-rust: bash -lc 'cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core && cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi resolve_rcc --lib -- --nocapture && cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi resolve_routecodex_config_path --lib -- --nocapture'
scripts.verify:config-toml-codec-rust: bash -lc 'cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core && cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi config_toml_codec --lib -- --nocapture'
scripts.verify:config-provider-codec-rust: bash -lc 'cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core && cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi config_provider_codec --lib -- --nocapture'
scripts.verify:hub-response-anthropic-native: bash -lc 'cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core && cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi anthropic --lib -- --nocapture'
scripts.verify:hub-response-responses-chat-proje: bash -lc 'cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core && cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi build_chat_response_from_responses --lib -- --nocapture && cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi response_path_preserves_existing_responses_custom_tool_call --lib -- --nocapture'
scripts.verify:hub-response-provider-sse-materia: bash -lc 'cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core && cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi provider_sse --lib -- --nocapture'
scripts.verify:hub-response-provider-context-hel: bash -lc 'cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core && cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi resolve_provider_response_context_helpers --lib -- --nocapture'
scripts.verify:hub-response-post-servertool-clie: bash -lc 'cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core && cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi project_post_servertool --lib -- --nocapture'
scripts.verify:vr-forwarder-runtime: bash -lc 'cd sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core && cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi forwarder --lib -- --nocapture'
